title: wandb: timing/throughput metrics + print run URL + on-by-default + robust defaults
description: Enhance wandb logging: (1) log per-iteration wall-clock seconds + throughput (iters/sec, self-play games/sec) so CPU-vs-GPU runs are comparable; (2) print the wandb run URL to stdout when enabled; (3) make wandb ON by default with --no-wandb to disable and tests forced off (WANDB_MODE=disabled); (4) set robust CLI/Modal defaults iterations=60, self-play-games=24, sims=128. Touches arena.py + modal_app.py.

title: Add Weights & Biases (wandb) logging
description: Opt-in wandb logging of AlphaZero training: per-iteration losses + self-play stats and final eval (wins/draws/losses vs perfect/random). Gated behind --wandb flag; graceful no-op if unavailable; no test depends on wandb.

title: Self-play data generation
description: Play full games where the net plays itself via MCTS. Record (canonical_state, mcts_pi, outcome_z) per move, z assigned from final result relative to mover. Output a list of training examples.

title: Two-headed neural network (PyTorch)
description: Shared trunk + policy head (move logits over action space) and value head (scalar tanh in [-1,1]). Game-agnostic input/output shapes derived from the Game interface. Forward returns (policy_logits, value).

title: Add Modal remote-training path (keep local)
description: Add an OPTIONAL Modal path to run AlphaZero training on the cloud without touching local resources. New modal_app.py with a remote training function + local entrypoint; bundle the alphazero package into the Modal image; wandb via a Modal secret; CPU by default, GPU configurable. Local CLI (python -m alphazero.arena) stays fully functional. modal is an optional dependency.

title: MCTS with PUCT
description: Network-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search. Node stats N/W/Q/P; PUCT selection; expansion via single net eval; value backup; Dirichlet noise at root; temperature-based action selection. Returns visit-count policy pi.
close_reason: Implemented PUCT MCTS (alphazero/mcts.py): N/W/Q/P edge stats, PUCT selection, single-eval expansion with illegal-move masking + prior renormalization, zero-sum per-ply value backup, optional root Dirichlet noise, and a temperature sampling helper. run() returns a visit-count policy summing to 1 over legal moves (0 on illegal). 9 tests pass incl. forced-win and block-the-loss; ubs clean (exit 0).

title: Evaluation + verify tic-tac-toe solved
description: Arena pitting candidate net vs previous/random/perfect player. Track win/draw/loss over iterations. Verify trained agent never loses tic-tac-toe and draws vs perfect play.

title: Game interface + tic-tac-toe rules
description: Abstract game interface (swappable rules module) + tic-tac-toe: board state, legal moves, apply move, terminal/winner detection, canonical board encoding for the net (planes), and a perspective-aware result. Game-agnostic so MCTS/training are reusable.
close_reason: Implemented Game ABC (alphazero/game.py) + TicTacToe rules (alphazero/games/tictactoe.py) per docs/ARCHITECTURE.md contract; 26 tests in tests/test_tictactoe.py pass; source modules clean under ubs (exit 0).

title: Training loop (policy + value loss)
description: Replay buffer of self-play examples. Loss = cross-entropy(net_policy, mcts_pi) + MSE(net_value, z) + L2. SGD/Adam optimizer; one iteration = generate self-play, train, checkpoint.

title: Configure bandit to skip B101 (assert) in tests
description: ubs/bandit flags B101 'assert used' as critical on every pytest test file (assert is idiomatic in pytest). Source modules are clean (0 critical/warning); only test files trip B101. Add a project-wide bandit skip for B101 in tests/ (e.g. [tool.bandit] skips=['B101'] or exclude tests dir) so 'ubs <test files>' exits 0 for all agents. Shared-config change, so coordinate to avoid concurrent pyproject edits. Also note: the uv editable install needed 'uv sync --reinstall-package alphazero' because the initial sync ran before any source existed (stale dist-info, missing .pth).
